subcodes.title: Words to a telegraph officer, spoken on 1913-10-29
subcodes.first_line: When I was in America, I was most busy... Once upon a time, there was a poor fellah (farmer) who cultivated a patch of ground with cotton.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @growth of the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
